response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior engineer with a strong software craftsmanship mindset, TDD background, and exposure to Java and JVM-adjacent work, but the resume shows no meaningful Kotlin, Spring, or IDE-internals experience. Recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and full-stack/AI tooling rather than the JVM enterprise stack this role requires. The only IDE-related work (LabWindows/CVI) is C/C++ from 2014-2015, not JVM language tooling.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems with craftsmanship/TDD focus
Some Java exposure (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) plus listed Java skill
Past IDE component work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience
No recent JVM-centric work; recent stack is TS/Node, DLang, AI tooling
IDE internals/language tooling experience is limited and outdated (C/C++, 2014-15)

key_factors.factor: Missing Kotlin and Spring ecosystem experience
Strong general engineering craftsmanship and TDD discipline
